improvements.title: Add Skip Links
improvements.description: Add skip navigation links for keyboard users
improvements.implementation: Add skip links at the top of each page

improvements.title: Enhance Form Labels
improvements.description: Ensure all form inputs have proper labels and ARIA attributes

improvements.title: Improve Alt Text
improvements.description: Add descriptive alt text to all images
improvements.implementation: Review and enhance alt text for better context

improvements.title: Enhance Color Contrast
improvements.implementation: Use WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text)

improvements.title: Improve Focus Management
improvements.description: Enhance focus indicators and keyboard navigation
improvements.implementation: Add visible focus states and tab order

improvements.title: Add Semantic HTML
improvements.implementation: Replace divs with nav, main, section, article where appropriate

recommendations.title: Automated Testing
recommendations.description: Implement automated accessibility testing with axe-core

recommendations.title: Screen Reader Testing
recommendations.description: Test with actual screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver)

recommendations.title: Developer Training
recommendations.description: Train developers on accessibility best practices
